## Source: ghsa-malware (4fd6c736dc1b7b884a996838fcc8c594d38ccd554fd7d6a402e669e19779a989)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (839538184262ac542c8ff20a2f5c8e1de29137acee4cf16ae1310f8856960426)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-notifications-notifyd' @ 1.2.8 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
